reference.title: Reference Topic Template
reference.shortdesc: Use this template guidance to write reference topics for commands, fields, and contracts.

ul.li: Present stable facts, field definitions, and option tables.
Avoid narrative explanation better suited to concept topics.
Avoid procedural steps better suited to task topics.

ol.li: Scope statement for the contract or interface.
Field table or command option table.

section.title: Style guidance
section.p: Use neutral, specific terms. Keep definitions precise and avoid ambiguous qualifiers.
